subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen proclaimeth: O friends! Hold ye fast unto that which leadeth to loftiness and exaltation and is the cause of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی میفرماید ای دوستان تمسک نمائید بچیزیکه سبب علو و سمو و علت
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action
